meta.note: Receives the ApprovalCard POSTed by the worker (set N8N_APPROVAL_WEBHOOK to this webhook's URL). Swap the email node for Telegram/Slack if preferred; the approve/reject links are plain URLs that work anywhere. For a true blocking gate, insert a 'Wait' node set to resume on webhook and route the resume URL as a third action.
